failure_summary: Critical failures across all dimensions: (1) ZERO posts pass the 9/7 floor — all 9 posts have empty scores and passes_9_7_floor=false, making this a complete quality collapse; (2) Anchor concentration violation — anchor 'Sitting through dozens of enterprise sales calls, watching SE introductions go wrong in real time' is used 5 times (A1, A4, B1, B2, B4, B5 = actually 6 times), exceeding the 3-use threshold; (3) Argument convergence — all 9 posts argue essentially identical thesis: 'AI presales spend is high but activity metrics are broken, real measurement is hard'; (4) Mechanic distribution failure — 100% reliance on 'specific_number' opener mechanic with zero variation; (5) Structural redundancy — posts are near-clones with only minor word substitutions ($12K/$14K/$22K, 'Claude Code API'/'OpenAI API'/'ChatGPT Enterprise'/'SiftHub AI seat licenses'), indicating template regurgitation rather than genuine variation; (6) Voice register — while not overtly corporate, the mechanical repetition creates generic 'content farm' effect that violates spirit of authentic founder voice.
recommendations: Halt production immediately and fix scoring pipeline — posts cannot be evaluated without scores populated
Mandate minimum 3 different opener mechanics: specific_number, scene_entry, and confession/pattern_observation
Enforce anchor diversity ceiling: no anchor used more than 2 times per 9-post pack
Require argument differentiation: cluster posts into distinct thesis buckets (e.g., cost paradox, skill erosion, buyer risk, implementation failure, competitive moat)
Add structural variation: some posts should open with scene/observation, some with pattern, some with direct confession — not all with '$X/month'
Consider reducing pack size to 5-6 posts with genuine variation rather than 9 templated clones
Flag 'SiftHub' product mentions as potential corporate drift — several posts read as veiled product marketing
